hero.description: Forward-thinking founders, top lawyers, accountants, clerks, and other professionals simplify and speed up their daily work with DoLegal.
hero.previewAttachmentIdle: Add PDF or Word — we read it alongside your question
hero.previewDropzoneIdle: Drop PDF or DOCX to analyze
hero.previewWaitingQuestion: Your question appears once context is ready…

previewUseCases.question: What is the deadline to register an employee in the tax system after starting operations?
previewUseCases.answerBody: You should register the employee within 3 working days after the employment relationship starts.

previewUseCases.question: Draft a service agreement for my company
previewUseCases.answerBody: Generating a service agreement aligned with the RA Civil Code — including pricing, payment terms, liability, and termination clauses...

previewUseCases.question: When must I register for VAT as an individual entrepreneur in Armenia?
previewUseCases.answerBody: VAT registration is required once turnover crosses the statutory threshold; invoicing and filing follow the RA Tax Code and e-invoicing rules.

previewUseCases.question: Draft a commercial lease for office space in Yerevan
previewUseCases.answerBody: Generating a commercial lease with rent, maintenance, permitted use, and handover clauses aligned with the RA Civil Code...

previewUseCases.question: What notice period applies when terminating an indefinite-term employment contract?
previewUseCases.answerBody: Notice periods depend on who initiates and on valid grounds; the Labor Code sets minimum notice and exceptions for serious misconduct or mutual agreement.

problem.description: The official sources exist, but the tools to use them efficiently do not. Until now.
oldWayItems: Manual keyword search across legal sources with no semantic understanding
No way to check if you found the current version of a law or an outdated amendment
Copy-pasting text between tabs to draft contracts or legal letters from scratch
2+ hours spent per case on research that still may miss relevant precedents
Global AI tools have zero Armenian law coverage
doLegalItems: Ask in Armenian, Russian, or English - get answers grounded in the actual law
Every answer cites the exact article, law code, and source - verify in one click
Generate NDAs, employment contracts, legal letters, and reporting drafts from prompts
Cut research and reporting prep time from 2 hours to under 20 minutes per case
Built specifically for Armenian law - updated every week from official sources

features.description: DoLegal combines legal research, document drafting, and legal assistant guidance - all powered by RAG retrieval over authoritative Armenian legal corpora.

cards.title: Legal Research
cards.description: Ask natural-language questions in Armenian, Russian, or English and receive structured answers with article-level citations.
items: Summarizes laws, regulations, and court decisions
Identifies relevant clauses and legal precedents
Cross-references official Armenian government legislation sources
Upload a document for context-aware Q&A

cards.title: Document Drafting
cards.description: Generate standard legal documents from prompts, with context-aware content pre-filled based on your inputs.
items: Statutory letters, claims, and formal notices
Export to DOCX for final editing

cards.title: Legal Assistant
cards.description: Understand what the law means for your situation - not just what it says. Step-by-step guidance for common legal scenarios.
items: Tax obligations, reporting cycles, state compliance
Entity and clause extraction from uploaded docs
OCR support for scanned legal documents

steps.title: Ask in your language
steps.description: Type your question in Armenian, Russian, or English - or upload a contract, court decision, or scanned document for analysis.

steps.title: AI retrieves the law
steps.description: DoLegal searches its indexed corpus of Armenian legislation and case law, retrieves the most relevant articles, and generates a grounded answer.

steps.title: Verify every citation
steps.description: Each answer includes article codes, law names, dates, and the responsible body. Every legal claim is traceable back to its source.

Track tax and reporting rule updates with weekly refreshes

cards.title: SME Founders & In-house Accountants

Draft NDAs and employment contracts yourself
Join early access now, choose a plan at launch

faq.descriptionPrefix: Still have questions? Write to us at

items.question: Is this legal counsel?
items.answer: No. DoLegal is a legal research and drafting tool - not a lawyer. All responses include a disclaimer and should be reviewed by a qualified legal professional before taking action.

items.question: How accurate are the citations?
items.answer: Every response is grounded in retrieved text from official government legislation sources. We target high citation alignment on monthly sample audits.

items.question: What languages does DoLegal support?
items.answer: You can ask questions and receive answers in Armenian, Russian, or English. The legal corpus is primarily Armenian with cross-language retrieval.

items.question: What is a token? How many do I need?
items.answer: A token is a unit of AI processing - roughly 0.75 words. Typical legal questions use 500-1,500 tokens, while full drafts use more.

items.question: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrades apply immediately with prorated billing, downgrades apply in the next billing cycle, and you can cancel any time.

items.question: How fresh is the legal database?
items.answer: The corpus is updated weekly from official Armenian government legislation sources.

footer.description: AI-powered legal research and drafting for the Armenian market. Built on official Armenian government legislation sources.
